attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ACTUAL_VALUE_DATE,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE1,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'  ')ADDRESS_LINE1,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE2,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'  ')ADDRESS_LINE2,
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE3,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'  ')ADDRESS_LINE3, 
replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE4,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'  ')ADDRESS_LINE4,
 MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ADDRESS_STYLE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ANTICIPATED_VALUE_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE1,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_ID,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')BANK_ACCOUNT_NUM,MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BANK_ACCOUNT_TYPE,replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BANK_NUM,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')BANK_NUM, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.BASE_AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECKRUN_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECKRUN_NAME, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_FORMAT_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_NUMBER,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_STOCK_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CHECK_VOUCHER_NUM, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CITY,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_AMOUNT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_BASE_AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_CHARGES_AMOUNT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_CHARGES_BASE_AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_ERROR_AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_ERROR_BASE_AMOUNT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_EXCHANGE_DATE, 
0 as CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE,   MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.COUNTRY, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.COUNTY, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CREATED_BY,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CREATION_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.CURRENCY_CODE,  replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),'  ')DESCRIPTION,MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.DOC_CATEGORY_CODE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.DOC_SEQUENCE_ID,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.DOC_SEQUENCE_VALUE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.EXCHANGE_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.EXTERNAL_BANK_ACCOUNT_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.FUTURE_PAY_DUE_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.IBAN_NUMBER, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MATURITY_EXCHANGE_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MATURITY_EXCHANGE_RATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MATURITY_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_BASE_AMOUNT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_BASE_AMOUNT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_CHARGES_BASE_AMT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_ERROR_BASE_AMOUNT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_CLEARED_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_MATURITY_EXG_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_MATURITY_EXG_RATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_MATURITY_EXG_RATE_TYPE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.MRC_STAMP_DUTY_BASE_AMT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ORG_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.PAYMENT_METHOD_LOOKUP_CODE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.PAYMENT_TYPE_FLAG,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.POSITIVE_PAY_STATUS_CODE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.PROVINCE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.RECONCILIATION_BATCH_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.RELEASED_AT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.RELEASED_BY, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.RELEASED_DATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.REQUEST_ID,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STAMP_DUTY_AMT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STAMP_DUTY_BASE_AMT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STATE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STOPPED_AT,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STOPPED_BY, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.STOPPED_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.TRANSFER_PRIORITY, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.TREASURY_PAY_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.TREASURY_PAY_NUMBER, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.USSGL_TRX_CODE_CONTEXT, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.VENDOR_ID,  replace(replace(replace(MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.VENDOR_NAME,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ') ,chr(234),' ')VENDOR_NAME,
MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.VENDOR_SITE_CODE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.VENDOR_SITE_ID, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.VOID_DATE,  MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.WITHHOLDING_STATUS_LOOKUP_CODE, MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.ZIP,
MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.PAYMENT_ID
FROM
 MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL
WHERE 
MF_AP_CHECKS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
